notes: Kalman dynamic-hedge-ratio pairs (deterministic predict/update recursion, no ML). Pairs EU/GU(0/1) AU/NU(2/3) XAU/XAG(4/5). Host leg via framework magic; partner legs via QM_BasketOpenPosition at their slots; both/all legs open+close together; warmup via QM_SymbolGuardInit+QM_BasketWarmupHistory. Closed-form estimators only, NO ML, no external feed. All legs in dwx_symbol_matrix.csv.
